positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized woodland scene combining elements of bioluminescence and celestial geometry. The main subject features stylized, interconnected roots, floating geometric crystalline forms, and delicate luna moth silhouettes rendered in a dense, Zentangle-inspired pattern. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and warm ochre yellow. The composition must be centered, perfectly balanced, and designed for print scalability. The overall style should emulate sophisticated engraved woodcuts and crisp stencil art, using solid silhouettes and intricate cross-hatching for visual texture. Minimalist yet maximalist feel. Studio shot, flat lay perspective, high contrast, graphic design.
